name: Wrathful Smite
description: The next time you hit with a melee weapon attack during this spell's duration, your attack deals an extra 1d6 psychic damage. If the target is a creature, it must make a Wisdom saving throw or be frightened of you until the spell ends. A frightened target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on a success.
effect: Empowers next melee weapon hit with 1d6 extra psychic damage; on hit target must save WIS or be frightened for the duration.
notes: On-hit rider: 1d6 psychic + secondary WIS save vs. frightened requires on-hit-rider + frightened condition engine support — see proposals.
Shape: buff (no save on cast, no spell attack). Mana 2: lower-damage smite (1d6); frightened condition is the value.
Spirit-dust stripped from stub: totem→bone-dust (not spirit-dust); psychic/fear is not substance-themed at L1 minor smite tier.
